comment: Reviewed accepted code clones for the duplication gate (G17). A genuinely-irreducible repetition goes here as {"fingerprint": "<12-hex from the gate output>", "reason": "..."}. Keyed by content fingerprint, so an accepted clone stays accepted after it moves lines. Write-guard-protected + gate-integrity-hashed: widening it is a reviewed human act. Empty by design — the shipped scaffold is DRY.
